failure_modes.text: False pattern recognition can make a familiar communication frame look right even when the audience's actual context is different.
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate the audience's actual context before applying a familiar communication frame; surface similarity can mask deep differences in interpretation.

failure_modes.text: Egocentric bias can make the sender assume the audience shares the same frame of reference, knowledge level, and interpretation rules.
failure_modes.mitigation: Check for egocentric projection: explicitly state what the audience's frame of reference, knowledge level, and interpretation rules are likely to be.

failure_modes.text: Too much detail can cause decision paralysis by forcing the audience to work harder than the message is worth.
failure_modes.mitigation: Calibrate detail to the audience's decision load; excessive context forces them to work harder than the message is worth.

premortem_questions.text: What is my audience's frame of reference, and how will this message be interpreted through that lens?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What is my audience's frame of reference, and how will this message be interpreted through that lens?

premortem_questions.text: Have we been explicit about how our recommendations will be implemented, and have we secured buy-in from those responsible for the doing?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Have we been explicit about how our recommendations will be implemented, and have we secured buy-in from those responsible for the doing?

premortem_questions.text: What existing models am I applying here, and are the underlying assumptions met in this new context?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What existing models am I applying here, and are the underlying assumptions met in this new context?

heuristics.text: Use perspective taking, initiative, nonverbal sensitivity, and goals together so communication is designed for the actual audience context.
Check whether the conversation is practical, emotional, or social before you decide how direct or detailed the message should be.
Put the governing thought up front and keep only the information needed for the audience to understand and act.

curation_notes.summary: The intervention layer stays on frame-aware packaging, audience-lens checks, and anti-overload message design.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broad communication-framework sprawl because the raw source is strongest on perspective fit, BLUF structure, and anti-stereotype discipline.
open_questions: The second heuristic compresses the source's conversational-mindset distinction into a practical steering rule.

allies: The raw source is rich on emotional-intelligence, systems-thinking, analytical rigor, and Feynman-style simplification.
antagonists: The source strongly names cognitive-load pressure, false objectivity, and stereotype shortcuts.
structured_tensions: No explicit structured tension block was preserved from the raw file.
